title: SOL 2pk Confetti Cannons Large - Giant Party Poppers Paper Cannon - Multicolour Papers Mix for Weddings, Birthdays, New Year's Eve, and Celebrations - Safe, Easy to Use, Perfect for Photos and Videos
features: CELEBRATE WITH FUN: A shower of multicolour confetti mix will leave a lasting impact on your guests. Our party confetti cannons will fill the room with a colourful explosion of joy.
MAKES PARTY MEMORABLE: Celebrating others is the best and these party poppers are exactly what you need to bring unforgettable memories with your family and friends.

BIODEGRADABLE: Confetti are made of lightweight fire resistant papers that are 100% biodegradable. It is a fantastic way to stun your friends outside in the open air while being environmentally friendly.v
IDEAL TO ANY THEMED PARTY: The multipurpose confetti cannon is ideal for any special occasion such as weddings,birthday, graduation, new year's eve, Christmas or any other holiday.
SAFE AND EASY TO USE: These confetti cannons are easy to use you just hold the bottom and twist. The paper colours are bright and the amount inside just perfect for pictures and video.

Simply hold the bottom and twist to release a colourful shower of confetti. It’s safe and easy to use at any event. Is the confetti safe to use indoors and outdoors? Yes, the confetti is made from lightweight, fire-resistant paper, making it safe for both indoor and outdoor celebrations. Can these cannons be used for any special occasion? Absolutely! These versatile confetti cannons are perfect for birthdays, weddings, graduations, New Year’s Eve, and other celebrations. How far does the confetti spread when released? When twisted, the confetti spreads across a wide area, filling the space with a fun burst of multicolour confetti that’s ideal for photos. Can the cannons be reused or are they one-time use? The cannons are designed for single-use, providing a memorable burst of confetti at your event. Each pack includes two cannons for extra fun.
